name: propellex-hni-platform
description: Azure-native HNI property investment platform for India

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd shared && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:shared
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend

author: Haneel Teja
